text:
Makefile changed:

Deleted why Port require always DATA

-OPTIONS_DEFINE= DATA
-OPTIONS_DEFAULT= DATA

Here works better NOPORTDATA

-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDATA}
+.if !defined (NOPORTDATA)


pkg-message.in changed:

+    /bin/chmod 644 %%DATADIR%%/*.kye
